scope: M4 navigation hazards, buoyage, lights and restricted visibility vocabulary draft. Draft only: no starter merge and no production deploy.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Buoyage mark type must remain exact.
Lateral mark must not become cardinal or safe-water mark.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: isolated danger / safe water / special mark
qa_notes.linguist_note: Hazard mark must not become safe-water term.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: safe water / isolated danger / special mark
qa_notes.linguist_note: Safe-water mark has a specific buoyage meaning.
Special mark must not become signal or other mark.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: leading lights / sector light / anchor lights
qa_notes.linguist_note: Leading lights and sector lights are different aids.
Sector light must not become leading or anchor light.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: fog signal / distress signal / fog bank
qa_notes.linguist_note: Fog signal is not distress signal or weather bank.
Shoal is shallow water hazard, not shore/channel.
Wreck hazard must not become rock or wake.
Side and action must remain exact.
Passing arrangement must preserve both sides.
Buoy status must remain exact.
Light status polarity must not reverse.
Signal class and heard status must remain exact.
Visibility condition must not become speed or restored status.
Hazard type and status must remain exact.
Hazard and relative direction must remain exact.
Course alteration command must preserve action and side.
Course alteration command must preserve action and side.
